source_note: Keeper Rulebook, Optional Rules: Spending Luck (p.99) + Luck rolls (p.93): investigators may spend Luck points to lower a roll toward a target number, roll Luck as a group, and recover Luck after each session of play.

spend.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.99: after a skill/characteristic roll, Luck points may be spent 1-for-1 to alter the result, up to the investigator's current Luck value.

roll.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.93: when several investigators make a Luck roll as a group, use the single lowest individual Luck roll to represent the whole group.

recovery.source_note: Keeper Rulebook p.99 (optional): after each session of play, roll 1D100 against current Luck; if the roll is higher than Luck, gain 1D10 Luck points, capped at 99. No resets; the starting value can be exceeded.
